data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `test-driven-development` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Create a focused issue for `skills/test-driven-development/`.

Scope:

* audit `SKILL.md` structure and wording
* verify the red-green-refactor guidance is still crisp and executable
* check for stale repo references or missing supporting assets
* identify whether the skill should be partially split into workflows/references/templates

Done when the repo-local work needed to normalize this skill is documented.
